ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division within the league */,
  "current_position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team within their division */,
  "current_score" REAL /* Current score of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the team plays home games */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team manager */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league commissioner */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division belongs to */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary stadium where division games are played */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "matchup_name" TEXT /* Name of the matchup */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the matchup belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the matchup */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the matchup */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the matchup is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the matchup */,
  "matchup_type" TEXT /* Type of matchup (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matchup */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the matchup */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the team in the matchup */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the matchup */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the matchup */,
  "win_count" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the matchup */,
  "loss_count" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the matchup */,
  "draw_count" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the matchup */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the matchup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., team, league, matchup) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
